name: UMG Envoy Agent
description: UMG cognitive runtime plugin variant wired to the public UMG Block Library surface for release packaging.

workspaceRoot.description: Plugin-local workspace root used for bundled doctrine, compiler, and runtime assets.

compilerRoot.description: Optional override path to a real umg-compiler checkout or compiled compiler-v0 root.

resleeverRoot.description: Optional override path to a real UMG_Envoy_Resleever checkout.

allowRuntimeWrites.description: Allow runtime-affecting resleeve/promote operations that modify runtime state files.

defaultSleeveId.description: Default sleeve id to use when a tool call omits sleeve selection.

debugDirectReplyBehavior.description: Enable legacy direct reply override behavior for trigger debugging. Default off.

allowRuntimeWrites.label: Allow runtime writes
allowRuntimeWrites.help: Enable operations that modify active runtime sleeve/stack state.

debugDirectReplyBehavior.label: Debug Direct Reply Behavior
debugDirectReplyBehavior.help: Enable legacy trigger reply override behavior for debugging only.
